reviews.title: Customer Reviews
reviews.subtitle: What our customers say about renting with us for their Bali trips

items.name: James R.
items.text: Absolutely seamless experience. Booked via WhatsApp, the NMAX was delivered to our villa in Canggu exactly on time. Spotless bike, great condition. Will use Benzride every time I visit Bali.

items.name: Emma L.
items.text: Really impressed! I was nervous about renting in Bali but the team made it so easy. The Scoopy was delivered to my hotel in Seminyak, and they even helped me with a route recommendation.

items.name: David K.
items.text: Delivered to our villa at the exact time we agreed. PCX was immaculate. Super responsive on WhatsApp — even replied at 11 PM when I had a question. Couldn't ask for better service.

items.name: Rina S.
items.text: Harga transparan, tidak ada biaya tersembunyi. Motor bersih dan nyaman. Sangat direkomendasikan buat wisatawan yang ingin jelajah Bali dengan bebas!

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.notFoundQ: Can't find the answer you're looking for?
faq.notFoundA: Our team is ready to help 24/7 via WhatsApp.

items.q: What documents are required to rent a motorcycle?
items.a: You need to provide a national ID (for Indonesian citizens) or Passport (for foreigners), and a valid driving license (SIM A or SIM C). A deposit will be required upon pickup.

items.q: Can the motorcycle be delivered to my location?
items.a: Yes! We offer free delivery and pickup anywhere in Bali — hotels, villas, the airport, seaport, or any location. Just include your address when booking.

items.q: What is the minimum rental duration?
items.a: The minimum rental is 3 days. We offer special rates for weekly and monthly rentals that are much more affordable than daily rates.
Yes, every motorcycle comes with 1 full-face or half-face helmet for free. You can request additional helmets by noting it in the comments section when booking.

items.q: How can I make a payment?
items.a: Two options: (1) Online payment via Xendit link — supports credit/debit cards, bank transfers, GoPay, OVO, and more. (2) Order via WhatsApp and pay cash when the bike is delivered.

items.q: Can I extend my rental period?
items.a: Of course! Contact us via WhatsApp before your rental period ends. We'll confirm availability and arrange the extension for you.

items.q: What happens if the motorcycle breaks down or has an accident?
items.a: Contact us immediately via WhatsApp. Don't panic — we'll help and guide you through the next steps. The bike's condition at pickup and return will be documented together.

items.q: Can I rent without a driving license?
items.a: No. A valid SIM A or SIM C driving license is a mandatory requirement for safety and legal compliance in Indonesia. We cannot waive this requirement.
For cancellations, contact us as soon as possible via WhatsApp. Refund policy depends on the cancellation time and payment method used. We always try to find the best solution.
Our WhatsApp service is active 24 hours. Bike delivery is arranged by mutual agreement. For deliveries outside normal hours (night/early morning), please discuss this with us beforehand.

bookingSuccess.title: Booking Confirmed!
bookingSuccess.desc: Thank you for booking with Benz Rental Bali. Our team will contact you shortly to confirm your bike delivery.
